title: Principal Frontend Developer at HP India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at HP India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
HP India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!
